response.justification: Bogdan is a strong staff-level engineer with 19+ years of experience and proven ability to architect systems at scale, demonstrating technical depth across all required languages and infrastructure platforms. However, the resume lacks explicit experience with core responsibilities: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, bias detection, and statistical analysis. While his architectural capability and leadership are evident, the absence of growth/experimentation domain expertise represents a significant gap for a Principal role requiring 4+ years in this specific area.
strengths: Staff-level technical leadership with 19+ years shipping systems at scale—handled millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby with real-time infrastructure
Deep technical breadth across all required languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, C, C++, Java) and distributed systems expertise (Kubernetes, AWS CDK, Docker)
Demonstrated commitment to engineering excellence and quality—authored testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and established TDD/CI/CD practices across organizations
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems—the core focus of this role
Resume lacks background in metrics, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or data-driven decision-making essential to growth systems
Career trajectory emphasizes full-stack and infrastructure work rather than growth/experimentation platform development; requires domain ramp-up

key_factors.factor: Missing experimentation platform and A/B testing expertise
Staff-level architecture and large-scale system experience
No demonstrated metrics, telemetry, or bias-detection focus
